title: pyrus zabelii
intro: Pyrus zabelii, also known as the Chinese pear or Zabel's pear, is a species of pear tree native to China. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus zabelii are said to include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and protecting against cardiovascular diseases. Pyrus zabelii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
